quick_fixes.title: Fix exception leakage in streaming responses
quick_fixes.description: Replace str(e) with generic error message; log full exception server-side
acceptance_criteria: All try/except blocks in streaming responses use generic messages
Full exception details logged to logger.error with exc_info=True
No API URLs or authentication details in error response JSON
Error message is: 'Provider request failed' (or similar generic)

quick_fixes.title: Add rate limiting / caching to health check endpoint
quick_fixes.description: Cache health check results for 10 seconds to prevent spam
acceptance_criteria: Health check endpoint returns cached result if <10s old
Endpoint still accepts fresh=true query param to bypass cache (optional)

quick_fixes.title: Document environment variable setup for security
quick_fixes.description: Add security section documenting required env vars and audit trail
acceptance_criteria: Section titled 'Environment Variables & Security' added to README
Lists all required env vars: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY
Explains diff between dev (.env) and prod (vault/secrets)

long_term_improvements.title: Boot-time environment variable validation
long_term_improvements.description: Validate all required env vars are set and non-empty on server startup

long_term_improvements.title: Comprehensive audit logging for API calls
long_term_improvements.description: Log provider=X, model=Y, duration_ms=Z for all LLM calls (no credentials)

long_term_improvements.title: Global rate limiting (SlowAPI or equivalent)
long_term_improvements.description: 1000 req/min global, 10 req/min for sensitive endpoints (/status, /compare)

deployment_checklist.description: Apply all 3 quick fixes (QF-001, QF-002, QF-003)
Set CORS_ORIGINS env var to production domain (not localhost)
Verify all sensitive env vars are set: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY
Run security scan: grep -rn 'sk-\|AIza\|Bearer sk-' backend/ (expect 0 matches)
Test error messages: trigger a 401 and verify no API URLs or keys are exposed
Enable audit logging, check CloudWatch/logs for sensitive data (should be none)

thesis_compliance.notes: Documentation needs SEC-B3 completion (env vars section)
